name: Flubendazole
description: Flubendazole is an anthelmintic that is used to treat worm infection in humans. It is available OTC in Europe.

interactions.name: Chloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Flubendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Chloroquine.

interactions.name: Amodiaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Flubendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Amodiaquine.

interactions.name: Primaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Flubendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Primaquine.

interactions.name: Hydroxychloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Flubendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Hydroxychloroquine.
